store.name: Cloud Forge App Store
store.description: One-command open-source app deployment powered by immutable images

apps.name: code-server
apps.desc: VS Code in the browser for remote development
cost_notice: Aliyun deploy defaults to cn-hongkong; pass --region for other regions.
Mainland China regions may fail bootstrap (Docker Hub / catalog CDN reachability).
Custom domains: AWS uses --domain + --hosted-zone-id (Route53); Aliyun uses --domain + --dns-domain (Alidns). DNS propagation and ACME may take several minutes.
First bootstrap may take 8-15 minutes on Aliyun public OS images.
You pay only for cloud resources such as ECS, EIP, disk, and data transfer.
